14.gl: the heart, i.e. (figuratively) the thoughts or feelings (mind); also (by analogy) the middle

15.gl: a good message, i.e. the gospel

19.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)
figuratively, a magistrate; by Hebraism, very
19.dv: of uncertain affinity; a deity, especially (with G3588 (ὁ)) the supreme Divinity;

19.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
19.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);

20.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)

something said (including the thought); by implication, a topic (subject of discourse), also reasoning (the mental faculty) or motive; by extension, a computation; specially, (with the article in John) the Divine Expres
20.kj: account, cause, communication, X concerning, doctrine, fame, X have to do, intent, matter, mouth, preaching, question, reason, + reckon, remove, say(-ing), shew, X speaker, speech,
